narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula 5-A (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 322 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
